name: soft-harness
description: Universal analyze and organize skills for inspecting live Claude Code and Codex state and keeping .harness as snapshot memory.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze and organize live host configs with LLM-guided workflows.
interface.longDescription: Soft Harness is a plugin-first workflow for inspecting and organizing live Claude Code and Codex state. `.harness` is kept as a reusable snapshot and decision-memory layer, while the real host files remain authoritative. The plugin keeps the user-facing surface in two skills, analyze and organize, and relies on thin deterministic helper code for inventory, origin hints, apply steps, and backups.
defaultPrompt: Use Soft Harness analyze to inspect this repo and refresh the .harness snapshot.
Use Soft Harness organize to share this MCP with Gemini too.
Use Soft Harness organize to remember this rule.
